title: test_coverage is 0.653, not 1.0 — some test paths may not be fully covered
evidence: test_coverage=0.653 from retort.db; 4 test functions in server_test.go cover happy paths but edge cases (e.g. malformed JSON, concurrent access) are untested
suggestion: Add tests for malformed request bodies, duplicate ISBNs, and boundary conditions to improve coverage

title: DELETE returns 204 No Content with no JSON body
evidence: server.go:216 — w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent) with no response body
suggestion: This is valid HTTP but inconsistent with the JSON response pattern of other endpoints; consider returning a JSON confirmation

title: No pagination on GET /books
evidence: server.go:143-167 — listBooks returns all rows unconditionally
suggestion: Not required by spec, but a production API would benefit from limit/offset params
